hero.title:

Trusted & Verified
hero.subheadline: Find quality manufacturers, exporters, and suppliers from all over Indonesia. Verified, reliable, and ready to support your business to the next level.

stats.supportDesc: Our support team is ready to help anytime

features.headline: Make supplier sourcing instant and hassle-free
features.summary: From first contact to verified purchase, we collapse the slowest parts of sourcing into one clear workflow.

panel.title: One workflow, fewer handoffs
panel.description: Every step is shaped to reduce broker dependency, speed up selection, and make trust visible before the first message is sent.

erp.title: Direct Purchasing
erp.desc: Connect procurement directly to primary manufacturers. No middlemen, no hidden markups, and guaranteed first-hand pricing

crm.title: Smart & Instant Matching
crm.desc: Enter your criteria. Our matching algorithm connects your business with trusted suppliers in minutes, not weeks

finance.title: Verified & Secure Transactions
finance.desc: Every partner undergoes vetting for legalities, capacity, and track record. Work together smoothly without worry

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.quote: Finding the right supplier should be as simple as ordering food. We believe every business deserves direct access to top-tier manufacturers without middleman obstacles
philosophy.description: IndoSupplier was born to end the drama of sourcing processes that waste weeks or cost markup broker fees. We simplify sourcing into a transparent, direct digital platform that saves time and money

waitlist.headline: Secure your competitive advantage today
waitlist.subheadline: We limit early access slots to ensure premium matching quality. This batch is currently 80% full. Sign up now before your competitors secure the best suppliers first

benefits.discount: Priority access to premium direct manufacturers
benefits.onboarding: Sourcing and negotiation assistance from our expert team
benefits.support: Zero platform commission fees for your first 6 months
benefits.noCard: Instant sign-up with no fees or financial commitments

footer.tagline: The No.1 Direct Supplier Purchasing Platform in Indonesia
